name: Hidden Trails of Northeast Vietnam: 7 Days of Discovery (Ha Giang, Ba Be)
duration: Places:Hanoi - Ha Giang - Pan Hou - Dong Van - Meo Vac - Ba Be lake
highlights: The tour is designed specifically for young people who love to explore, want to engage in the daily life of ethnic minorities and learn more about their unique culture.
Immerse in the wild, majestic beauty of the Northwest nature, explore wonders such as Ha Giang Stone Geopark, Ba Be Lake, and Hoang Su Phi terraced fields.
Experience the tranquil life in the homestays of local residents, understand more about the culture and customs here.

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Hoang Su Phi
itinerary.description:
Morning

Begin the day with a delightful breakfast in Hanoi before being chauffeured at 08:00 to Hoang Su Phi, a captivating site nestled in Northeast Vietnam within Ha Giang province. As you approach Ha Giang, traverse through gigantic nature, witness picturesque rice terraces etched into hillsides and awe-inspiring rock formations that punctuate stunning canyons, you can understand why the Southeast Vietnam area is so famous for the breathtaking landscapes. Along the way, encounter ethnic minorities whose livelihoods revolve around cultivating rice in terraced fields. Then we take a brief lu...

itinerary.title: Hoang Su Phi Exploration
itinerary.description:
Morning

Wake up to a fresh atmosphere and enjoy a signature upland  breakfast of Ha Giang and. Around 8:00, led by our knowledgeable tour guide, our trekking tour will kick off. Embark on an easy stroll to Nam Hong village, a place with the harmony of agriculture and nature. The alluring beauty of terraced rice fields will make everyone in awe. During the trip, the guide takes us around to gain insights into the remarkable crafts of the locals

itinerary.title: Hoang Su Phi - Ha Giang
itinerary.description:
Morning

Rise early to enjoy the crisp morning air and partake in a nourishing breakfast. The Ha Giang trip leads you to scenic beauty of this captivating mountainous region and encountering diverse ethnic minorities in Northern Vietnam. We will probably reach Ha Giang at lunchtime, therefore we will stop by a local restaurant for a meal. Afternoon

Following a short break, venture to Tien Thang village located just outside the city. This village is where the Tay ethnic group lived

itinerary.title: Ha Giang - Dong Van
itinerary.description:
Morning

Dong Van and Meo Vac are two destinations in our plan today. The trip starts immediately after a swift breakfast. These destinations, nestled in remote areas with rugged mountains and charming hill tribal communities, promise making the expedition of the day an engaging experience. Following the exhilarating trek, indulge in a delightful lunch and enjoy a well-deserved nap. Afternoon

Proceed to Sa Phin in the afternoon, home to the renowned H'mong King Palace—a must-visit historic site

itinerary.title: Meo Vac - Ba Be Lake
itinerary.description:
Morning

Begin your day with a hearty breakfast and prepare for the enchanting journey to Ba Be Lake. At 08:00, our dedicated driver will escort you to Ba Be National Park, unveiling the untamed beauty of the tropical forest in Northeast Vietnam. Immerse yourself in the rich cultural tapestry of the Lo Lo and Pu Peo ethnic minorities in Meo Vac. These communities, steadfast in preserving their historical and cultural traditions, are easily identified by their distinctive clothing. Afternoon

Embark on an afternoon trek along the rocky and winding roads leading to Ba Be, traversing the highland...

itinerary.title: Ba Be National Park
itinerary.description:
Morning

The day kicks off lively with a boat trip from 08:00. On the Nang River, tourists will primarily marvel at the stunning Puong Cave, a prominent cavern located in the park's northwestern corner. The main cave stretches approximately 300 meters in length and soars over 50 meters in height. Following this, a visit to the Dau Dang waterfall awaits, characterized by a series of rapids spanning almost a kilometer along the Nang River. After these adventures, relish a leisurely lunch, unwind, and indulge in a rejuvenating nap

itinerary.title: Ba Be - Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

For the last minutes of the trip, have a leisure breakfast. Before the trip comes to an end, we bid farewell to the host family, express gratitude towards them for such a wonderful experience. Then, we hop on the last road trip to transfer us from the Northern village to Hanoi city. On the way back, we still can look outside of the window to view the gorgeous scenery along the meandering path, including the local ethnic minority peoples' stilt homes, wide palm treeland, and verdant tea gardens. After arriving in Hanoi, we will drop you off at your hotel in Hanoi, or at the airport for...

included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing (except overnight at local homestay and on train)
All transports and transfer as per itinerary
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per itinerary
Meals as indicated in the program
